result:
Results for 'restaurants and top attractions' in Udaipur, Rajasthan:
1. Ambrai Ghat [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.7 (12000 reviews)
   🕐 Closed · Opens 6 AM
   📍 Chandpole Maji, Ka Mandir corner of Lake
   "Dining under the starry night sky here is an unforgettable experience."
2. Jajmaan - Best Lakeview Restaurant & Hotel in Udaipur [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.7 (1700 reviews) | ₹400–1,200
   📍 55-D, Hotel Natural Marg
   "Great food nice service beautiful view of rooftop"
3. One o Eight Restaurant and Lounge [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.8 (237 reviews) | ₹200–1,200
   📍 Paras Circle, Hotel White Manor, opp. Reliance Mart, near HDFC Bank
   "The service and the views from this restaurant is awesome."
4. The Sunset Terrace, Fateh Prakash Palace [North Indian] ⭐ 4.0 (440 reviews) | ₹2,000+
   🕐 Closed · Opens 7 AM
   📍 The City Palace Complex, Lake, City Palace Rd
   "The food , the ambience pretty much sums up all and the vibes are nice too"
5. Gangaur Ghat [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.6 (14000 reviews)
   📍 4, opp. Jethiyo ka Akhada
   "Amazing views with amazing restaurants and cafes."
